examples.name: IOS-XE ARP table with subinterfaces
examples.input:
Protocol  Address          Age (min)  Hardware Addr   Type   Interface
Internet  10.12.90.1              -   fa16.3eff.9c9e  ARPA   GigabitEthernet2.390
Internet  10.12.90.2            139   fa16.3eff.5a76  ARPA   GigabitEthernet2.390
Internet  10.12.110.1             -   fa16.3eff.9c9e  ARPA   GigabitEthernet2.410

examples.name: Live device output
examples.input:
Protocol  Address          Age (min)  Hardware Addr   Type   Interface
Internet  10.24.0.1               9   5254.0053.ccc5  ARPA   GigabitEthernet3
Internet  10.24.0.2               -   5254.0022.28dc  ARPA   GigabitEthernet3
Internet  10.34.0.1             246   5254.0022.2e01  ARPA   GigabitEthernet2
Internet  10.34.0.2               -   5254.001d.82bf  ARPA   GigabitEthernet2

examples.name: ARP entries on VLAN interfaces with private VLAN suffixes
examples.input:
Protocol Address Age (min) Hardware Addr Type Interface
Internet 172.16.255.1 - 28af.fdea.ccdf ARPA Vlan200
Internet 192.168.1.201 3 0000.0000.0001 ARPA Vlan201 pv 202
Internet 192.168.1.203 3 0015.0100.0001 ARPA Vlan201 pv 203

examples.name: Multiple subnets with SRP-A entry missing interface
examples.input:
Protocol  Address              Age(min)       Hardware Addr     Type      Interface
Internet  172.16.233.229       -              0000.0c59.f892    ARPA      Ethernet0/0
Internet  172.16.233.218       -              0000.0c07.ac00    ARPA      Ethernet0/0
Internet  172.16.233.19        -              0000.0c63.1300    ARPA      Ethernet0/0
Internet  172.16.233.209       -              0000.0c36.6965    ARPA      Ethernet0/0
Internet  172.16.168.11        -              0000.0c63.1300    ARPA      Ethernet0/0
Internet  172.16.168.254       9              0000.0c36.6965    ARPA      Ethernet0/0
Internet  10.0.0.0             -              aabb.cc03.8200    SRP-A
